untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition for 'Dual BARR' requires detection of multiple peaks, trend line proximity, rounded appearance, and sequential volume spikes at specific formation stages. These multi-bar pattern characteristics (initial peak near trend line, second peak formation below first peak, price drop through trend line) cannot be expressed as simple indicator-based conditions using only the allowed single-bar indicators. Requires pattern detection logic, trend line fitting, and relative peak comparison unavailable in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted partial rule using volume spikes and price crossing pivot (as proxy for trend line) with downward direction, but core pattern logic is untranslatable. The signal requires complex multi-bar pattern geometry analysis not expressible in the allowed indicator framework.
